calculator.invalid_deck_code: Invalid deck code or failed to load deck
calculator.deck_loaded: Deck loaded successfully ({{deckSize}} cards in main deck)
calculator.add_target_cards_prompt: Add target cards to calculate probabilities

intro.title: What is Hypergeometric Distribution?
intro.text: The hypergeometric distribution calculates the probability of drawing a specific number of 'success' cards from a deck without replacement. It's perfect for Yu-Gi-Oh! because once you draw a card, it's no longer available in your deck.

how_it_works.title: How It Works
how_it_works.K: Number of target cards in deck
how_it_works.k: Target cards you want to draw
how_it_works.example_desc: Drawing exactly 1 Ash Blossom from 3 copies in a 40-card deck with 5-card hand:

key_concepts.title: Key Concepts
key_concepts.exact_desc: Probability of drawing exactly the specified number of target cards.
key_concepts.atleast_desc: Probability of drawing the specified number or more target cards.
key_concepts.targets_desc: The specific cards you want to draw (e.g., combo pieces, hand traps).
key_concepts.searchers_desc: Cards that can find your targets, effectively increasing your success rate.

destiny.title: Destiny Draw (draw 1 after opening)
destiny.desc: Treat as drawing the first h+1 cards of the deck.
destiny.note: If your group requires ≥2 cards, this shortcut is not applicable.

greed.title: Pot of Greed (draw 2 after opening)
greed.desc: Treat as drawing the first h+2 cards of the deck.

prosperity.title: Pot of Prosperity (m ∈ {3, 6})
prosperity.desc: Complement rule: fail both steps (none in opening, none in m excavated), then subtract from 1.
prosperity.note: This matches ‘no replacement’ across stages (open h, then check top m of the remaining deck).

desires.title: Pot of Desires (banish 10, then draw 2)
desires.desc: Complement rule across stages; the marginal result equals drawing the first h+2 cards.

how_to_use.title: How to Use This Calculator
how_to_use.step1_desc: Paste your deck code and validate it to load your deck list. Only main deck cards are used for calculations.
how_to_use.step2_desc: Group related cards together (e.g., 'Hand Traps', 'Combo Starters') and set how many you want to draw.
how_to_use.step3_desc: View probability breakdowns and optimize your deck ratios based on the calculations.

advanced.title: Advanced Features
advanced.groups_desc: Create groups of related cards and specify how many you want to see. For example:

hand_traps.title: Hand Traps
hand_traps.desc: Want to see at least 1 from Ash Blossom, Maxx 'C', etc.

combo_starters.title: Combo Starters
combo_starters.desc: Want exactly 1-2 combo pieces in opening hand

engine_cards.title: Engine Cards
engine_cards.desc: Want to avoid drawing too many engine pieces

advanced.searchers_desc: Assign searcher cards to specific groups to get more accurate probabilities. The calculator considers that drawing a searcher is almost as good as drawing the target card itself.

tips.title: Pro Tips
tips.item1: Use realistic hand sizes (5 for going first, 6 for going second)
tips.item2: Group cards by function rather than by name for better insights
tips.item3: Consider searchers when calculating combo piece probabilities
tips.item4: Save and share your configurations to compare different deck builds
